channel.title: GitHub Astro Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Astro in GitHub

item.title: JustGoodUI/dante-astro-theme
item.description: Dante, a single-author blog and portfolio theme for Astro.js.

item.title: arthelokyo/astrowind
item.description: ⭕️ AstroWind: A free template using Astro 5 and Tailwind CSS. Astro starter theme.

item.title: netlify-templates/astro-platform-starter
item.description: A modern starter based on Astro.js, Tailwind CSS, and Netlify Core Primitives (Edge Functions, Image CDN, Blob Store).

item.title: incluud/accessible-astro-components
item.description: A collection of accessible components for Astro projects with built-in ARIA attributes, keyboard navigation and interactive elements. Easy to implement and customize to your needs.
